meta.question: Show the trace from "High signal exposures" to the analyses that verify it.
meta.finalAnswer:
Trace from "High signal exposures" to analyses:

**Requirement:** "High signal exposures" (tmt:requirement)
- Located in: APS Black Box Specification > 04 APS L3 Requirements > L3 APT Requirements

**Dependency Target:** "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity" (hierarchyelement)
- This is the parent requirement that "High signal exposures" depends on

**Verification Status:** No analyses verify "High signal exposures" in this model.

The model contains only 2 "verify" relationships total:
1. "M3 to APS-TMT Interface Point Alignment Error Analysis" (block) → verifies "Telescope Pupil Alignment" requirement
2. "Post-Segment Exchange Duration Scenario" (test case) → verifies "Post-Segment exchange alignment time" requirement

Neither of these verification relationships connect to "High signal exposures" or "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity". The trace shows only a dependency relationship (not a verify relationship) between "High signal exposures" and its parent requirement.

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("High signal exposures"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("signal"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("High signal exposures"))) 
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High signal exposures" .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?targetName ?targetType WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?elem vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel rdf:type vocab:verify .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
  ?target rdf:type ?targetType .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?rel ?relType WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?elem vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Acquisition%20Camera%20sensitivity" .
  ?target ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?targetName WHERE {
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Acquisition%20Camera%20sensitivity" .
  ?source vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?qn WHERE {
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Acquisition%20Camera%20sensitivity" .
  ?source vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?qn .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?name WHERE {
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Acquisition%20Camera%20sensitivity" .
  ?source vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?name .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?target ?id WHERE {
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?source vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfSource ?rel .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:MDObject_ID ?id .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?source ?sourceName ?relType WHERE {
  ?source vocab:Element__directedRelationshipOfTarget ?rel .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
  OPTIONAL { ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?source ?sourceName ?relType WHERE {
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name "High%20signal%20exposures" .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_source ?source .
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
  OPTIONAL { ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?p (COUNT(*) as ?c) WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type vocab:dependency .
  ?rel ?p ?target .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?p), "target"))
} 
GROUP BY ?p
ORDER BY DESC(?c)
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?source ?sourceName ?relType WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type vocab:verify .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_source ?source .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name "APS%20Acquisition%20Camera%20sensitivity" .
  OPTIONAL { ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?relType (COUNT(*) as ?c) WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?relType), "verify"))
} 
GROUP BY ?relType
ORDER BY DESC(?c)
LIMIT 10

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?source ?sourceName ?target ?targetName WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type vocab:verify .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_source ?source .
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_name ?targetName .
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?source ?sourceName ?target ?targetQN WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type vocab:verify .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_target ?target .
  ?rel vocab:DirectedRelationship_source ?source .
  ?source vocab:NamedElement_name ?sourceName .
  ?target vocab:NamedElement_qualifiedName ?targetQN .
}
LIMIT 100

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?relType (COUNT(*) as ?c) WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?relType), "vocab:"))
} 
GROUP BY ?relType
ORDER BY DESC(?c)
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?relType WHERE {
  ?rel rdf:type ?relType .
}
LIMIT 50

request.reason: Found the trace: "High signal exposures" has a dependency relationship to "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity". However, there are no "verify" relationships from analyses to either element in the model - the only verify relationships in the model point to different requirements (Telescope Pupil Alignment and Post-Segment exchange alignment time).

Neither of these verification relationships connect to "High signal exposures" or "APS Acquisition Camera sensitivity". The trace shows only a dependency relationship (not a verify relationship) between "High signal exposures" and its parent requirement.
